title: The "AI Job Apocalypse" is CANCELLED!
summary: Wes Roth argues against the notion of an imminent "AI Job Apocalypse," discussing whether IPOs and other factors are driving employment concerns. The video presents "The Human Sandwich" and explores key mechanisms underlying AI's real impact on work.
